ops.text:
MID-RUN CHECKPOINT (early return; forced finalize before all 8 passes complete).

STATUS: setup + sampling + paraphrases + pipeline all VALIDATED. Voting is 1/8 passes complete and healthy; 7 passes still running in the background (harness bg task bz1y4jgvh, vote.py pid 2590), ETA ~45 min.

VERIFIED SO FAR:
- Sample built: 80 rows, stratified (direction 18, status_update 8, wrong_approach 8, operational_directive 7, new_task 7, incorrect_change 6, question 6, unwanted_action 5, style_violation 5, premature 5, other 5). out/sample.jsonl.
- Paraphrases authored (opus, model=large); 10/10 spot-check PASS (meaning/intent/technical refs preserved, terse stayed terse). Frozen summary-fidelity context + qa per row.
- Judge path validated: structured_judge(Verdict, tier=medium)=SONNET via ClaudeCliBackend, ~27s/call, concurrency 8 (8 calls/47s). One extract confirmed sane (wrong_approach on the Parakeet-mlx row).
- PASS 1 (control r1): judged=80, failed=0, in_chars=949276 (~237k tok, ~2966 tok/row). votes_control_r1.jsonl written; clone_control_r1.db holds its verdicts (role e16_control_r1). E8 honored (fresh clone per pass).

SPEND SO FAR ~= $2.0 (paraphrases opus ~$1.0; control r1 sonnet ~$0.9; smoke tests ~$0.13). Projected full run ~$8.6 (under $10 cap).

RESUME PATH (any future lane, ~45 min or after bg completes):
1. vote.py is now resume-aware (skips a pass whose votes_<arm>_r<rep>.jsonl has 80 non-null rows) — re-running reuses completed passes. Command: `cd /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-exp0 && eval "$(ccp env)" && uv run --no-sync --active python /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E16/scripts/vote.py`
2. When all 8 out/votes_*.jsonl exist: `uv run --no-sync --active python /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E16/scripts/analyze.py` -> writes out/results.json + out/summary.txt (control_flip baseline, per-factor flip + delta vs control on binary is_steering AND 11-way category, by-category breakdown, flagged_factors per the pre-registered >5pt rule).

No flip results yet — deliberately NOT reporting fabricated numbers. Headline flip fields are pending until the 8 passes + analyze.py complete.
